title: Rustic x Simple Grass Flowers Compat
description: Creates compatibility between Rustic and Simple Grass Flowers, particularly with the flowers shown on grass blocks.
body:
### **Rustic x Simple Grass Flowers is a compatibility resource pack between [Rustic](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rustic-resource-pack) and [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers)!** ###

- - -

**This pack adds compatibility to do with the flower and rock overlays shown on grass blocks, but does not affect the clovers on grass blocks or any other overlays shown from Simple Grass Flowers (Nylium, Mycelium, and Podzol). Despite being somewhat limited, this pack still adds quite a lot of pretty variations to grass blocks, and does not break anything else from either of the packs.**

- - -

### **How to Install:** ###

Format the Resource Packs like so:
![Setup for how compat should be in resource pack folder. Rustic and Simple Grass Flowers are interchangeable.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2505942bbdaa250a3181c220ca7a7938d1e1768.png)
Rustic and Simple Grass Flowers are interchangeable depending on if you prefer the extra things seen in Simple Grass Flowers on blocks other than the grass block or just the simplistic look that Rustic offers. **It's important that the compat go over both, or else it won't work.**
